name: Shantou Wanshun New Material Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shantou Wanshun New Material Group Co., Ltd. engages in the packaging material, aluminum foil, and functional film businesses in China. Its products include smart optical-controlled window films, ITO conductive films, barrier films, self-adhesive switchable transparent films, packaging cardboards, aluminum foils, and aluminized products. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.
